scripts.start:redis: docker run -d --name medisync-redis -p 6379:6379 redis || docker start medisync-redis
scripts.start:server: npx wait-on http://127.0.0.1:8200/v1/sys/health && cd server && npm start
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:redis" "npm run start:vault" "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client" "npm run start:ml"
